companyDescription: CVX is building Scandinavia's leading community of Business angels and facilitator of board positions. We invest in carefully selected start-ups and growth companies in collaboration with more than 700 active angel investors, board members, and entrepreneurs, and we have already helped around 100 companies grow by providing capital, knowledge, and networking.
companySlogan: Investing In Our Future Together.
descriptionHtml:
Venture Analyst - CVX Ventures

Är du passionerad kring venture capital och konsten att hitta banbrytande startups? Går du igång på utmaningen att identifiera bolag med hög potential, analysera trender och fatta investeringsbeslut som skapar verklig tillväxt?

Om du trivs i en dynamisk miljö, vill ha verkligt ansvar från dag ett och vill omges av skarpa, drivna personer som andas entreprenörskap – då är det här rätt roll för dig.

Som vår nya Venture Analyst kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att hitta, utvärdera och välja ut de mest lovande bolagen i tidig fas och tillväxtfas, i flera branscher.

Vårt Mission

Vi kopplar samman erfarna yrkespersoner och investerare med noggrant utvalda startups och tillväxtbolag med stor potential. Som medlem i vårt nätverk investerar du inte bara kapital – du bidrar med din kunskap, erfarenhet och ditt nätverk för att aktivt skapa värde och driva tillväxt.

CVX Ventures är en av Europas snabbast växande venture-investerare. Vi gör det möjligt för våra partners att investera i handplockade case som matchar deras intressen, branscher och expertis.

Sedan 2020 har vårt community vuxit till över 700 medlemmar – från affärsänglar och operativa ledare till styrelsemedlemmar och C-level executives – som tillsammans har investerat över 800 miljoner DKK i mer än 100 bolag.

Att vara en del av CVX innebär att vara en del av ett aktivt nätverk där affärer hanteras med omsorg.

CVX består i dag av 20 ambitiösa och talangfulla personer i Köpenhamn, London och Oslo.

Som Venture Analyst kommer du att:

  • Spela en ledande roll i hela investeringsprocessen – från första kontakt till att stänga affären
  • Ansvara för din egen portfölj och hjälpa till att hitta och samarbeta med de mest lovande tillväxtbolagen
  • Skapa och hantera ett starkt och kontinuerligt deal flow, och agera snabbt och själsäkert när rätt möjlighet dyker upp
  • Generera deal flow genom att bygga en stark närvaro i startup-ekosystemet – genom att delta i events, hålla föredrag, nätverka och kontakta grundare direkt
  • Utvärdera möjligheter genom att fokusera på det som verkligen spelar roll – hitta rätt information, ställa rätt frågor och analysera affärsmodeller, marknader och team.

Vi förväntar oss att du har:

  • Stark arbetsmoral och känsla för tempo
  • Förmåga att stänga affärer
  • Ovanlig drivkraft och vilja att vara bäst på det du gör
  • Ett proaktivt arbetssätt och ansvarstagande i allt du gör
  • Passion för analys och investeringar
  • Förmåga att sälja både dig själv och CVX
  • Exceptionella analytiska och strukturerade problemlösningsförmågor
  • God relationsbyggande förmåga och genuint intresse för människor
  • Nyfikenhet och vilja att ständigt lära och förbättra
  • Kandidatexamen eller master med mycket goda resultat
  • 2–5 års erfarenhet av venture capital, entreprenörskap, consulting, banking eller liknande.

Vad vi erbjuder dig:

En unik möjlighet att ta dig in i venture capital- och startupvärlden. Som Venture Analyst får du praktisk erfarenhet av hela investeringsprocessen – från att hitta och utvärdera startups till att slutföra investeringar.

Du får inblick i en rad olika branscher, affärsmodeller och tillväxtresor, och arbetar nära erfarna investerare och entreprenörer. En front row seat till den snabbfotade världen av startups och early-stage investeringar.

Start: Så snart som möjligt

Plats: Köpenhamn, Oslo eller Stockholm.

companyDescription: DBT Capital is on a mission to enable better financing to SMEs so that they can unleash their full potential. Since 2017 we've lent billions to several hundred Swedish SMEs. Our advanced business analysis and intelligence platform in the hands of our experienced and talented teams enables swift, data-driven and digi:human SME lending, at scale.
companySlogan: Growth loans that enable great companies to unleash their full potential.
descriptionHtml:
CREDIT INVESTMENT ANALYST AT DBT CAPITAL


At DBT, we are committed to empowering Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) and entrepreneurs by providing the financing they need to grow. Since our inception in 2017, we have supported over 300 Swedish companies with more than SEK 3 billion in loan financing. Backed by prominent investors such as Öhman, Östersjöstiftelsen, and Öresund Investment, and with financing secured by global banking giant NatWest, we are building the next generation of SME lenders.


We leverage our proprietary digital platform for lending and analysis to challenge the traditional financing market, offering an alternative or complement to institutional banks and factoring companies. DBT has been recognized by Sifted as a "Nordic Scaleup to Watch" and named one of Europe’s fastest-growing companies by the Financial Times in 2021 and 2023. We are a registered financial institution under the supervision of Finansinspektionen and are supported by the European Investment Fund (EIF).


We are seeking a forward-thinking and driven Credit Investment Analyst to join our team in Stockholm and help us continue providing SMEs with the financing they deserve.


About the Role


As a Credit Investment Analyst, you will be a key player in DBT’s growth team. In a collaborative, dynamic environment, you will focus on underwriting deals while contributing to building our reputation alongside a diverse and supportive team. This role offers the opportunity to work closely with a talented group of professionals, bringing varied experiences together to create innovative solutions.


Core Responsibilities


  • Due Diligence: Conduct commercial and financial due diligence using DBT’s in house platform, Growth Hub.
  • Credit Investment Memos: Prepare credit investment memos and present them to DBT’s Credit Committee.
  • Negotiations: Negotiate and structure deals, supported by DBT’s experienced legal team.
  • Portfolio Management: Assist with ongoing monitoring and management of portfolio companies, including analyzing financial performance, identifying value creation opportunities, and tracking market trends.
  • Value Creation: Contribute to in-house projects focused on strategic growth, product development, and brand awareness.


Who Are We Looking For?


At DBT, we believe in the power of teamwork, and we value individuals who share our belief in collaboration, innovation, and inclusivity. We are looking for an Analyst who thrives in a fast-paced, growth-driven environment. You are a curious self-starter with a strong sense of business acumen and an entrepreneurial mindset. We especially encourage female applicants who seek to combine professional ambition with personal development.


To succeed in this role, we believe you have:


  • A minimum of a bachelor’s degree (a master’s degree is a plus), preferably in Finance, Economics, or Engineering.
  • At least 2 years of experience in corporate finance, transaction advisory, consulting, venture capital, or a relevant field. Entrepreneurial backgrounds, where you have raised funding in any form, are also considered.
  • Proficiency in PowerPoint and Excel.
  • Excellent command of both Swedish and English in all forms of communication.


Furthermore, we believe you possess the following skills:


  • Financial Analysis: Strong ability to analyze financial reports, including balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements.
  • Risk Assessment: Ability to identify, evaluate, and mitigate potential risks associated with lending to growing SMEs.
  • Attention to Detail: Meticulous in reviewing financial data and detecting critical issues that may affect a customer's creditworthiness.
  • Presentation Skills: Ability to present complex financial information clearly and confidently to prospects, clients, and internal colleagues.


At DBT Capital, we nurture a culture of respect, diversity, and inclusivity. We believe that our strength lies in empowering individuals, and we foster an environment where every voice is heard. We value hard work, camaraderie, and offer robust support to ensure your personal and professional growth.

We will be conducting interviews on an ongoing basis and look forward to receiving your online application. For questions, please contact Natalie Eklund at natalie@dbt.se. Please note that we do not accept applications via email due to GDPR regulations.

companyDescription:
Our unique combination of transformative strategy, transactions and corporate finance delivers real-world value – solutions that work in practice, not just on paper.

Benefiting from EY’s full spectrum of services, we’ve reimagined strategic consulting to work in a world of increasing complexity. With deep functional and sector expertise, paired with innovative AI-powered technology and an investor mindset, we partner with CEOs, boards, private equity and governments every step of the way – enabling you to shape your future with confidence. EY-Parthenon is a brand under which a number of EY member firms across the globe provide strategy consulting services. For more information, please visit ey.com/parthenon.
companySlogan: Transformative Strategy and Transactions that work in practice, not just on paper.
descriptionHtml:
Are you ready to shape the future with confidence?

Är du redo att starta din karriär inom M&A och bli en del av ett globalt rådgivningsteam? Vi på EY-Parthenon Corporate Finance söker nu nya medarbetare till vårt växande team. Hos oss får du arbeta med strategiska transaktioner för företag, entreprenörer, offentlig sektor och investerare som Private Equity och infrastrukturfonder – både i Sverige och internationellt.

Vi är en ledande M&A-rådgivare inom mid-marketsegmentet och organiserade i sex sektorteam: Technology, Life Science, Energy and Infrastructure, Industrial Products, Real Estate och Financial Services. Genom branschfokus, hög kvalitet och stark drivkraft har vi varit rådgivare i många affärskritiska och prestigefyllda transaktioner.

Möjligheten: ditt nästa äventyr väntar på dig

I Din Roll Som Analytiker Kommer Du Få Ett Stort Ansvar Och Direkt Ta En Aktiv Roll i M&A-transaktioner, Pitchar Och Annat Säljarbete. Du Kommer Att Vara Baserad På Vårt Stockholmskontor, Med Möjlighet Till Distansarbete (hybrid Arbetsmodell), Och Rollen Är På Heltid. Det Kan Ibland Krävas Nationella Och Internationella Resor. Arbetsuppgifterna Inkluderar

  • Analys av företag och branscher
  • Företagsvärdering
  • Finansiell modellering
  • Informationsinsamling och förberedelse av olika typer av presentationsmaterial
  • Support vid due diligence, förberedelse av dokument och stöd i dialoger med kund, motparter och andra rådgivare
  • Säljarbete och dialoger med nuvarande samt potentiella kunder

Vad vi söker

Vi söker dig som har ett genuint intresse för finansbranschen och vill bygga en karriär inom Corporate Finance/M&A. Vidare bör du ha en god analytisk förmåga, mycket energi, drivkraft och vara en utpräglad lagspelare med god social förmåga som kan leverera högkvalitativa resultat under korta deadlines.

Kvalifikationer

  • Slutförd masterutbildning inom finansiell ekonomi, företagsekonomi, industriell ekonomi eller annan relevant utbildning
  • Starka akademiska resultat
  • Mycket goda kommunikativa egenskaper på svenska och engelska i både i tal och skrift
  • Goda kunskaper i Microsoft Office (Excel och Powerpoint)
  • Tidigare erfarenhet från Corporate Finance, Private Equity, Transaction Services, Strategy Consulting eller liknande är meriterande men inte ett krav

Are you ready to ”Shape your future with confidence”? Ansök idag.

companyDescription:
We are the leading retained search and recruitment specialists for private markets professionals. We work across investment strategies, in-house functions and geographies. Whether you are building your team or seeking a vital strategic hire, we go to extraordinary lengths to identify and attract exceptional professionals for private equity, venture capital, private credit, secondaries and real assets. Every day we bring people together who will shape the future of this dynamic, international industry.

We are a people business, sharing knowledge and know-how across private capital.

We live and breathe private markets every day, talking to people, gathering information and contributing to industry conversations. We understand what makes each firm different, so we can represent the distinctive features of your fund in the competition for great people.

We know what it takes to identify and attract the right person. That’s because our experience has shown us what works. We are always honest, determined to succeed and creative in our approach. We never give up and you can rely on us for inspired ideas and a diligent approach that will secure the right person for your team.
companySlogan: People at the heart of private markets
descriptionHtml:
About our client

We are working with Europe’s leading and largest impact focused early-stage VC fund. Based in Stockholm, they have backed some of Europe’s most innovative and ambitious founders tackling the world’s biggest problems in line with the ‘17 UN Sustainable Development Goals’. The portfolio includes companies such as Submer, Einride, Trawa and Syre.

The close-knit team are united by one simple question: “Where do we find the next impact unicorn?”.

In their pursuit of this goal, they are looking to expand their team as they continue to broaden their geographical focus across Europe. They are looking for an Investment Analyst who will be based in Stockholm. They are a small team, so every hire has an exponential impact on every result they produce, and it is an exceptionally flat structure with proven scope for progression. As a team, a commitment to diversity has been one of their founding principles and this is reflected in their 50/50 gender split across not only the fund, but uniquely also at all investment levels.

Through their impact lens, they have a portfolio spanning foodtech, cleantech, healthtech and energy transition among many others.The mission is to back the best founders to produce a combination of a high impact and financial returns.

The fund is an independent vehicle with fully commercial returns targets. It was incubated by (and continues to be linked to) one of the largest impact hubs globally. The impact this has on the deal flow is hard to over-emphasise as it provides unparalleled access to the top tier impact entrepreneurs.

They are thought leaders in the impact space and are on a mission to build the next reference investor in the impact space. This is a unique opportunity to join an entrepreneurial fund investing in some of the most exciting companies in Europe and making a demonstrable impact.

What the job involves

  • Support all aspects of the investment process, from sourcing through execution and portfolio management
  • Evaluate and screen investment opportunities for both commercial potential and measurable impact
  • Build networks across Europe, representing the fund and their values in the market

Who we are looking for

  • Full-time years of relevant experience (e.g. management consulting, investment banking, private equity, venture capital) or in another analytical/strategic role
  • Study or work experience in a technical field is a plus
  • Strong VC or startup network in Dach, UK or France is advantageous
  • Passionate about making the world a better place, with conviction that entrepreneurship and strong business models drive positive change
  • Deeply analytical thinker who thrives in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment
  • Proactive thinkers who can demonstrate hustle and hunger throughout their lives
